name: agentic-design-engineering
description: Transform generic UIs into intentional, inhabited digital places — four interconnected design frameworks (Build, Style, Move, Write) with 13 skills and specialized agents.

interface.shortDescription: Transform generic UIs into intentional, inhabited digital places.
interface.longDescription: Four interconnected design frameworks — Build (structure), Style (atmosphere), Move (interactivity), Write (communication) — that any AI agent can apply to turn default-looking interfaces into spaces that feel crafted, alive, and distinctly human.
